'''Dalron Five''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was devastated during the long [[Siege of Dalron Five]], in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used strategies first devised by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]].

The planet's inhabitants, who were mainly of [[Human/Legends|Human]] descent, fled the world and were discovered by the Imperial [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]]. Despite keeping his promise not to reveal their location, his Imperial superiors managed to track down the refugees and catch them.

The disaster provoked Dodonna to harden his commitment to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].
